dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4702 IS: China Subsidy Response and Export Competitiveness Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Gallego (for himself and Mr. Ricketts) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 to counter subsidies provided by the Government of the People's Republic of China, to protect critical United States industries, and to strengthen United States economic and national security competitiveness.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the China Subsidy Response and Export Competitiveness Act of 2026.
Section 2(c)(3)(B) of the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 (12 U.S.C. 635(c)(3)(B)) is amended by inserting or in the United States after business.

section.header: Expansion of Program on China and Transformational Exports
section.text: Section 2(l)(1) of the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 (12 U.S.C. 635(l)(1)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking directly neutralize export subsidies and inserting neutralize subsidies; and
by striking export credit and inserting credit; and
in the matter preceding clause (i), by striking direct exports and inserting exports;
in clause (vii), by striking and semiconductor machinery and inserting , semiconductor machinery, and printed circuit board;
by redesignating clause (xi) as clause (xii); and
by inserting after clause (x) the following:
